From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

Professional basketball club in Kosovo

**KB Ylli**, known as **Golden Eagle Ylli** for sponsorship reasons, is a professional [basketball](/wiki/Basketball "Basketball") club based in [Theranda](/wiki/Therand%C3%AB "Therandë"), [Kosovo](/wiki/Kosovo "Kosovo").[[1]](#cite_note-Golden_Eagle-1) The club currently plays in the [Kosovo Basketball Superleague](/wiki/Kosovo_Basketball_Superleague "Kosovo Basketball Superleague"). Its fan club is called Xhebrailat.

## History

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=KB_Ylli&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: History")]

KB Ylli is one of the oldest basketball clubs in [Kosovo](/wiki/Kosovo "Kosovo"). It was founded in 1975.[[1]](#cite_note-Golden_Eagle-1) The club is known for its fans who support their club in especially in home games at 13 Qërshori sports hall. Their home matches are known for the fantastic atmosphere created by "Xhebrailat". *Ylli* means "star" in English.

In 2008 the club decided to withdraw from Kosovo Superleague due to bad financial conditions, and didn't play until 2014 when Golden Eagle, a beverage company from [Theranda](/wiki/Therand%C3%AB "Therandë"), decided to be the main sponsor of the team and to pay for [Wild Card](/wiki/Wild_card_(sports) "Wild card (sports)") which returned KB Ylli in Kosovo Superleague.[[2]](#cite_note-2) The 2015–16 season was the second consecutive in the Kosovo Superleague. In the [2014–15](/wiki/2014%E2%80%9315_Kosovo_Basketball_Superleague "2014–15 Kosovo Basketball Superleague") season, they finished fourth and played in playoff finals against [Sigal Prishtina](/wiki/Sigal_Prishtina "Sigal Prishtina"). In the 2018-19 season of Kosovo Basketball Superleague they finished second and lost the semi-finals of the play off against [KB Rahoveci](/wiki/KB_Rahoveci "KB Rahoveci"). In the 2019-20 season they lost the final of Kosovan Cup against [KB Peja](/wiki/KB_Peja "KB Peja").

In 2021, Ylli won their first league title and the [Liga Unike](/wiki/Liga_Unike "Liga Unike"). In the [following year](/wiki/2021%E2%80%9322_Kosovo_Basketball_Superleague "2021–22 Kosovo Basketball Superleague"), Ylli won the league title again.[[1]](#cite_note-Golden_Eagle-1)

## Honours

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=KB_Ylli&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Honours")]

* **[Kosovo Superleague](/wiki/Kosovo_Basketball_Superleague "Kosovo Basketball Superleague")**:
  + **Winners (2):** 2020–21, 2021–22
  + Runners-up (2): 1994–95, 2023–24
* **[Kosovo Cup](/wiki/Kosovo_Cup_(basketball) "Kosovo Cup (basketball)")**:
  + Runners-up (2): 2019–20, 2020–21
* **[Liga Unike](/wiki/Liga_Unike "Liga Unike")**:
  + **Winners (1):** 2020–21
  + Runners-up(2): 2021-22, 2023–24
* **Superkupa Mbarëkombëtare**
  + **Winners (1):** 2021

## Arena

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=KB_Ylli&action=edit&section=3 "Edit section: Arena")]

The club currently plays in the sport center Palestra 13 Qershori, in the center of [Theranda](/wiki/Therand%C3%AB "Therandë"), with a capacity for around 1300 spectators.[[3]](#cite_note-3)
